---
title: "FINALEXAM123PART3"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(GGally)
```

```{r}
#a)
sales <- data.frame(Revenue = c(150,200,250,300,350,400), Month = c("January", "February", "March", "April", "May", "June"))
mean(sales$Revenue)

#b)
barplot(sales$Revenue ~ sales$Month, xlab = "Months", ylab = "Monthly Revenue", main = "Company Sales - Monthly Revenue", col = "darkorange")
#c)
ggplot(sales, aes(x = Month, y = Revenue)) + geom_col(fill = "darkorange", col = "black") + labs(x = "Month", y = "Monthly Revenue", title = "Company Sales - Monthly Revenue")

#d)
pie(sales$Revenue, col = c("orange", "blue", "red", "green", "purple", "black"), main = "Revenue by months 1-6")
```
